TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqCon-dialog2_ciwas_tiwas 2021s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

TRANSL.notes: 那位(他)已過世.

S.TRANSL: 那位 已過世.
He already died.

S.FORM: wada gedang tikuh pawan nii kiya.
S.PHON: wada gedaŋ tikuħ pawan nii kija.
S.FORM: wada gedang tikuh pawan nii kiya.
S.PHON: wada gedaŋ tikuħ pawan nii kija.

TRANSL.notes: 在這Pawan小的時候那位(他)就已過世.

S.TRANSL: 在這Pawan小的時候那位 就已過世.
He died at the age when Pawan was small.

TRANSL.notes: 他因(與別人)打架而死去.

S.TRANSL: 他因 打架而死去.
He fought with others, and he died.
約死於30歲.
He was about thirty years old.

TRANSL.notes: (因打架的傷)身體羸弱很久.

S.TRANSL: 身體羸弱很久.
He was ill for a long time.

TRANSL.notes: 你(Pawan)那時還小嗎?

S.TRANSL: 你 那時還小嗎?
Were you a child at that time?

S.FORM: laqi kana deheya nii umbeyax naq meepah bubuna.
S.PHON: laqi kana deħeja nii umbejax naq meepaħ bubuna.
S.FORM: laqi kana deheya nii umbeyax naq meepah bubuna.
S.PHON: laqi kana deħeja nii umbejax naq meepaħ bubuna.

TRANSL.notes: 他們(指Pawan的兄弟姐妹)都還小,他們的媽媽很能工作(才得以養育其子女).

S.TRANSL: 他們 都還小,他們的媽媽很能工作 .

TRANSL.notes: Their siblings were all small. Their mothers was very diligent (so that she could bring up children.)

S.TRANSL: Their siblings were all small. Their mothers was very diligent
我那時還小,是我去做.
At that time I was still small. I went to do...

S.FORM: maha theyaq tikuh a phuling ka uqiandaha camac.
S.PHON: maħa tħejaq tikuħ a pħuliŋ ka uqiandaħa ʦamaʦ.
S.FORM: maha theyaq tikuh a phuling ka uqiandaha camac.
S.PHON: maħa tħejaq tikuħ a pħuliŋ ka uqiandaħa ʦamaʦ.

TRANSL.notes: (那時)家裡有獵物可食用是由我跟隨族人去打獵而得的.

S.TRANSL: 家裡有獵物可食用是由我跟隨族人去打獵而得的.
At that time, I went with elders to hunt game for us to eat.

S.FORM: kii iniku XXXX yesu paru kii di uxesu maha tikuh han.
S.PHON: kii iniku xxxx jesu paɾu kii di uxesu maħa tikuħ ħan.
S.FORM: kii iniku XXXX yesu paru kii di uxesu maha tikuh han.
S.PHON: kii iniku xxxx jesu paɾu kii di uxesu maħa tikuħ ħan.

TRANSL.notes: 那(隨族人去打獵)應是你長大後的事了吧,你小時候不可能去.

S.TRANSL: 那 應是你長大後的事了吧,你小時候不可能去.
It should be after you had grown up. How can you go hunting in such a small age?

S.FORM: ini wa kndalaxku sbiciq iniku keepah han.
S.PHON: ini wa kndalaxku sbiʦiq iniku keepaħ ħan.
S.FORM: ini wa kndalaxku sbiciq iniku keepah han.
S.PHON: ini wa kndalaxku sbiʦiq iniku keepaħ ħan.
S.TRANSL: 不是哦,我從小經常不做農務.
I did, I rarely did farmwork when I was young.
而從小就以獵田鼠為樂.
and I played chasing mouse since small,
且跟著族人們去狩獵.
I followed elders to go hunting.

S.FORM: ano ano ba kingan cecesu na.
S.PHON: ano ano ba kiŋan ʦeʦesu na.
S.FORM: ano ano ba kingan cecesu na.
S.PHON: ano ano ba kiŋan ʦeʦesu na.

TRANSL.notes: 你(Pawan)僅有一位姐姐是嗎?

S.TRANSL: 你 僅有一位姐姐是嗎?
Do you only have one elder sister?

S.FORM: mahasu inu mahasu inu qmapi ka knahanisu hitiansu malax na tamasu di peni Pawan tikuhsu han.
S.PHON: maħasu inu maħasu inu qmapi ka knaħanisu ħitiansu malax na tamasu di peni pawan tikuħsu ħan.
S.FORM: mahasu inu mahasu inu qmapi ka knahanisu hitiansu malax na tamasu di peni Pawan tikuhsu han.
S.PHON: maħasu inu maħasu inu qmapi ka knaħanisu ħitiansu malax na tamasu di peni pawan tikuħsu ħan.

TRANSL.notes: 怎麼可能去(狩獵)..你(當時)年紀那麼小怎麼可能去放陷阱,Pawan你父親丟下你的時候(指你父親早逝),你還小.

S.TRANSL: 怎麼可能去 ..你 年紀那麼小怎麼可能去放陷阱,Pawan你父親丟下你的時候 ,你還小.
How can you go to hunt? You are too small to put a trap at that time. Pawan, when your father left you, you were still small.

S.FORM: tenaku mke tenaku mangan manganmiyan sume a awi takun muudus na han.
S.PHON: tenaku mke tenaku maŋan maŋanmijan sume a awi takun muudus na ħan.
S.FORM: tenaku mke tenaku mangan manganmiyan sume a awi takun muudus na han.
S.PHON: tenaku mke tenaku maŋan maŋanmijan sume a awi takun muudus na ħan.

TRANSL.notes: Awi Takun還活著時(那時)我已經獵到熊了.

S.TRANSL: Awi Takun還活著時 我已經獵到熊了.
At that time when Awi Takun was alive, I had already hunted a bear.

TRANSL.notes: (那時)你父親還健在嗎?

S.TRANSL: 你父親還健在嗎?
Were your father still alive at that time?

S.FORM: muudus na ma bobona dung musaku mangan sume yami ka pawan muhing dungan.
S.PHON: muudus na ma bobona duŋ musaku maŋan sume jami ka pawan muħiŋ duŋan.
S.FORM: muudus na ma bobona dung musaku mangan sume yami ka pawan muhing dungan.
S.PHON: muudus na ma bobona duŋ musaku maŋan sume jami ka pawan muħiŋ duŋan.

TRANSL.notes: 我父親還健在..之後我又與Pawan Muhing協力獵到熊(另一隻).

S.TRANSL: 我父親還健在..之後我又與Pawan Muhing協力獵到熊 .
He was still alive. After that, I hunt another bear with Pawan Muhing.

S.FORM: un asi mssnegulunnamu daha awi takun mangan a sume siida na.
S.PHON: un asi mssnegulunnamu daħa awi takun maŋan a sume siida na.
S.FORM: un asi mssnegulunnamu daha awi takun mangan a sume siida na.
S.PHON: un asi mssnegulunnamu daħa awi takun maŋan a sume siida na.

TRANSL.notes: 是的(我曉得)..那時候你相繼與Awi Takun他們獵獲熊.

S.TRANSL: 是的 ..那時候你相繼與Awi Takun他們獵獲熊.
yes, I remember you caught bear twice in a row with Awi Takun and others.
是的.
Yes.

TRANSL.notes: 你跟隨他們(狩獵)時是幾歲呢?

S.TRANSL: 你跟隨他們 時是幾歲呢?
About what age did you go hunting with elders?
About twelve or eleven.
twelve?
it should be about twelve or thirteen

S.FORM: jyuuni nisay uxesu ba pkela biciq ba jyuici na wa.
S.PHON: jjuuni nisaj uxesu ba pkela biʦiq ba jjuiʦi na wa.
S.FORM: jyuuni nisay uxesu ba pkela biciq ba jyuici na wa.
S.PHON: jjuuni nisaj uxesu ba pkela biʦiq ba jjuiʦi na wa.

TRANSL.notes: 你不可能會(打獵)..11(歲)太小了,

S.TRANSL: 你不可能會 ..11 太小了,
How was it possible? Eleven years old is too small to go hunting.

S.FORM: XXXX jyusang gurai da maha kii mahasu mkela hari di.
S.PHON: xxxx jjusaŋ guɾai da maħa kii maħasu mkela ħaɾi di.
S.FORM: XXXX jyusang gurai da maha kii mahasu mkela hari di.
S.PHON: xxxx jjusaŋ guɾai da maħa kii maħasu mkela ħaɾi di.
S.TRANSL: 約13歲左右你才會稍懂得狩獵.
You should have been thirteen or fourteen when you learn a little hunting skill.

S.FORM: ma um ini wadaku jyuisai hari seungku naq paru.
S.PHON: ma um ini wadaku jjuisai ħaɾi seuŋku naq paɾu.
S.FORM: ma um ini wadaku jyuisai hari seungku naq paru.
S.PHON: ma um ini wadaku jjuisai ħaɾi seuŋku naq paɾu.

TRANSL.notes: 不,我約11(歲),我本來就個兒高大.

S.TRANSL: 不,我約11 ,我本來就個兒高大.
Yes, I was really about twelve, my height was tall enough you know.
即使個兒高大也..
Even if you are tall...

S.FORM: wada huwa mesa wada hu wada mhuqin maanu tamasu wamu ini hunuy lu saya.
S.PHON: wada ħuwa mesa wada ħu wada mħuqin maanu tamasu wamu ini ħunuj lu saja.
S.FORM: wada huwa mesa wada hu wada mhuqin maanu tamasu wamu ini hunuy lu saya.
S.PHON: wada ħuwa mesa wada ħu wada mħuqin maanu tamasu wamu ini ħunuj lu saja.
S.TRANSL: 是如何..你父親是因何過世,我剛才尚未錄得.
I have not recorded yet how your father died.
知道.
I see.
請詳述,從頭說.
Tell me in detail from the beginning.

TRANSL.notes: 因(家父)與其他族人鬥毆而死的.

S.TRANSL: 因 與其他族人鬥毆而死的.
Since he was beaten by others, he died
他們鬥毆的原因是什麼呢?
What is the reason they beat your father.

TRANSL.notes: (家父)被對方用杵具鎚擊.

S.TRANSL: 被對方用杵具鎚擊.
He was pounded by mallet.
他們鬥毆的原因是什麼呢?
What is the reason they beat your father.

S.FORM: mona rudo ye mona rudo ye mkuni han ma.
S.PHON: mona ɾudo je mona ɾudo je mkuni ħan ma.
S.FORM: mona rudo ye mona rudo ye mkuni han ma.
S.PHON: mona ɾudo je mona ɾudo je mkuni ħan ma.
S.TRANSL: 是起因於Mona Rudo與對方發生爭執.
For the reason of Mona Rudo, they went angry.

S.FORM: dmayo hii ka tama wada tsipaqun seru heya di.
S.PHON: dmajo ħii ka tama wada tsipaqun seɾu ħeja di.
S.FORM: dmayo hii ka tama wada tsipaqun seru heya di.
S.PHON: dmajo ħii ka tama wada tsipaqun seɾu ħeja di.

TRANSL.notes: 家父則為Mona Rudo出頭,被對方以杵具鎚擊結果(家父)...

S.TRANSL: 家父則為Mona Rudo出頭,被對方以杵具鎚擊結果 ...
and then my father defended Mona Rudo. So they pounded him with mallet.

TRANSL.notes: 是誰槌擊(您父親)的?

S.TRANSL: 是誰槌擊 的?
Who thursted your father?
是來自Bkasan部落的族人.
People from Bkasan village
Bkasan部落的族人嗎?
People from Bkasan village?
一個叫做Kuwa的族人.
A person called Kuwa.

TRANSL.notes: (是叫做)Kuwa (的人).

S.TRANSL: Kuwa .

TRANSL.notes: (A person called) Kuwa.

S.TRANSL: Kuwa.

S.FORM: mneyah bkasan ini usa theruy Boarung han deheya kii ciida.
S.PHON: mnejaħ bkasan ini usa tħeɾuj boaɾuŋ ħan deħeja kii ʦiida.
S.FORM: mneyah bkasan ini usa theruy Boarung han deheya kii ciida.
S.PHON: mnejaħ bkasan ini usa tħeɾuj boaɾuŋ ħan deħeja kii ʦiida.

TRANSL.notes: 是來自Bkasan部落的族人嗎?當時他們(指Bkasan部落的族人)尚未遷至Boarung部落嗎?

S.TRANSL: 是來自Bkasan部落的族人嗎?當時他們 尚未遷至Boarung部落嗎?
Were they from Bkasan village? Hadn't they moved to Boarung village at that time?
還沒有,還居住在Bkasan部落.
Not yet, they still lived in Bkasan.

TRANSL.notes: (Bkasan部落的族人)是由Pradu部落(遷至Bkasan部落)是嗎?

S.TRANSL: 是由Pradu部落 是嗎?
They had moved from Pradu village to Bkasan village, is that right?

S.FORM: un kndalax pradu ma musa bkasan.
S.PHON: un kndalax pɾadu ma musa bkasan.
S.FORM: un kndalax pradu ma musa bkasan.
S.PHON: un kndalax pɾadu ma musa bkasan.

TRANSL.notes: 是的..(他們)從Pradu部落遷至Bkasan部落.

S.TRANSL: 是的.. 從Pradu部落遷至Bkasan部落.
Yes, they originally moved from Pradu to Bkasan.
當初他們是因逃難而分散的.

TRANSL.notes: At first, they escaped (from quake site) separately.

S.TRANSL: At first, they escaped separately.

S.FORM: kika musa musa yaana musa a so a piimah ane a meniq a.
S.PHON: kika musa musa jaana musa a so a piimaħ ane a meniq a.
S.FORM: kika musa musa yaana musa a so a piimah ane a meniq a.
S.PHON: kika musa musa jaana musa a so a piimaħ ane a meniq a.

TRANSL.notes: 所以..(家父)可能是去..到Bkasan部落時受宴於姐妹的先生家飲酒.

S.TRANSL: 所以.. 可能是去..到Bkasan部落時受宴於姐妹的先生家飲酒.
So, my father may have been to Bkasan vilaage to attend ceremony in my sister's husband's house.

S.FORM: meniq a bkasan hii ka ruwahmu.
S.PHON: meniq a bkasan ħii ka ɾuwaħmu.
S.FORM: meniq a bkasan hii ka ruwahmu.
S.PHON: meniq a bkasan ħii ka ɾuwaħmu.
S.TRANSL: 我舅舅Ruwah就住在Bkasan.
My uncle, Ruwah, lived in Bkasan.

TRANSL.notes: (Ruwah)是我媽媽的哥哥.

S.TRANSL: 是我媽媽的哥哥.
Ruwah is my mother's brother.

TRANSL.notes: Ruwah(當時是)居住在Bkasan部落那邊嗎?

S.TRANSL: Ruwah 居住在Bkasan部落那邊嗎?

TRANSL.notes: Did Ruwah live in Bkasan there (at that time)?

S.TRANSL: Did Ruwah live in Bkasan there ?

S.FORM: X huh mnenaq bkasan ruwah kiya.
S.PHON: x ħuħ mnenaq bkasan ɾuwaħ kija.
S.FORM: X huh mnenaq bkasan ruwah kiya.
S.PHON: x ħuħ mnenaq bkasan ɾuwaħ kija.
S.TRANSL: 是居住在Bkasan部落.
Yes, he lived in Bkasan.

S.FORM: mnenaq Bkasan beebuun ka kuwa a.
S.PHON: mnenaq bkasan beebuun ka kuwa a.
S.FORM: mnenaq Bkasan beebuun ka kuwa a.
S.PHON: mnenaq bkasan beebuun ka kuwa a.

TRANSL.notes: Kuwa被(我們馬赫坡部落的親戚)揍.

S.TRANSL: Kuwa被 揍.

TRANSL.notes: Kuwa was beaten (by our relatives of Mhebu) somehow.

S.TRANSL: Kuwa was beaten somehow.

S.FORM: pshako bgurah ka hakota nenaq henu hii peni.
S.PHON: psħako bguɾaħ ka ħakota nenaq ħenu ħii peni.
S.FORM: pshako bgurah ka hakota nenaq henu hii peni.
S.PHON: psħako bguɾaħ ka ħakota nenaq ħenu ħii peni.

TRANSL.notes: 是在我們(馬赫坡部落)的新橋處嗎?

S.TRANSL: 是在我們 的新橋處嗎?

TRANSL.notes: Was it at the new bridge (by our Mhebu tribe)?

S.TRANSL: Was it at the new bridge ?
我知道這件事.
I know that.

S.FORM: muda sipo napakuna mmahamiyan busi ma inu.
S.PHON: muda sipo napakuna mmaħamijan busi ma inu.
S.FORM: muda sipo napakuna mmahamiyan busi ma inu.
S.PHON: muda sipo napakuna mmaħamijan busi ma inu.

TRANSL.notes: 從對岸過(的那座橋),(有一次)家父揹著我(經過那座橋)要到Busi部落.

S.TRANSL: 從對岸過 , 家父揹著我 要到Busi部落.
My father once passed that bridge and went to Busi village, carrying me on his back.

S.FORM: ye malu ciida han ye ini knarux.
S.PHON: je malu ʦiida ħan je ini knaɾux.
S.FORM: ye malu ciida han ye ini knarux.
S.PHON: je malu ʦiida ħan je ini knaɾux.
S.TRANSL: 那是在你父親還健康的時候吧,還沒生病..
At that time, your father was still healthy. He was not sick yet.

S.FORM: ma kndalax mnbeyan kii tamasu de bsiyaq miiyax.
S.PHON: ma kndalax mnbejan kii tamasu de bsijaq miijax.
S.FORM: ma kndalax mnbeyan kii tamasu de bsiyaq miiyax.
S.PHON: ma kndalax mnbejan kii tamasu de bsijaq miijax.
S.TRANSL: 你父親從那次被毆傷後休養很久是嗎?
Did your father ill for a long time after he was pounded?

TRANSL.notes: (家父)就一直有胸痛的病情.

S.TRANSL: 就一直有胸痛的病情.
My father suffered from chest pain all the time.

TRANSL.notes: 那時(Pawan的父親)就一直生病了.

S.TRANSL: 那時 就一直生病了.
Pawan's father was ill for a long time then.

S.FORM: um ye wada naqah teerangna tnkanan na seru.
S.PHON: um je wada naqaħ teeɾaŋna tnkanan na seɾu.
S.FORM: um ye wada naqah teerangna tnkanan na seru.
S.PHON: um je wada naqaħ teeɾaŋna tnkanan na seɾu.

TRANSL.notes: 就是因被(Kuwa)以杵具槌擊胸部後,引起(家父)胸部長期的病痛.

S.TRANSL: 就是因被 以杵具槌擊胸部後,引起 胸部長期的病痛.
Because Kuwa people pounded his chest, it caused him chronic chest pain.

S.FORM: um uka ising uka eiuy ciida.
S.PHON: um uka isiŋ uka eiuj ʦiida.
S.FORM: um uka ising uka eiuy ciida.
S.PHON: um uka isiŋ uka eiuj ʦiida.

TRANSL.notes: (當時我們部落)沒有醫生.

S.TRANSL: 沒有醫生.

TRANSL.notes: (At that time in our village) no doctor.

S.TRANSL: no doctor.

S.FORM: naka naq deh naka hbaro laqi bubu pawn pawan nii na.
S.PHON: naka naq deħ naka ħbaɾo laqi bubu pawn pawan nii na.
S.FORM: naka naq deh naka hbaro laqi bubu pawn pawan nii na.
S.PHON: naka naq deħ naka ħbaɾo laqi bubu pawn pawan nii na.

TRANSL.notes: (如果Pawan的爸爸沒發生這意外),Pawan的母親也應該有更多的子女.

S.TRANSL: ,Pawan的母親也應該有更多的子女.

TRANSL.notes: (If the accident had not occurred to his father), Pawan's mother would have had more children.

S.TRANSL: , Pawan's mother would have had more children.

S.FORM: ma o ma kika wada nanneng hari mnarux sanjyu nansay mnarux a.
S.PHON: ma o ma kika wada nanneŋ ħaɾi mnaɾux sanjju nansaj mnaɾux a.
S.FORM: ma o ma kika wada nanneng hari mnarux sanjyu nansay mnarux a.
S.PHON: ma o ma kika wada nanneŋ ħaɾi mnaɾux sanjju nansaj mnaɾux a.

TRANSL.notes: 約30多歲時(開始)生病.

S.TRANSL: 約30多歲時 生病.
He started to be sick around thirty years old.

TRANSL.notes: (他病了多少年?)依你的印象?

S.TRANSL: 依你的印象?
So, how many years had he been sick in your memory?

S.FORM: jyunansay gurai wa mnarux hii jyunanneng wa.
S.PHON: jjunansaj guɾai wa mnaɾux ħii jjunanneŋ wa.
S.FORM: jyunansay gurai wa mnarux hii jyunanneng wa.
S.PHON: jjunansaj guɾai wa mnaɾux ħii jjunanneŋ wa.

TRANSL.notes: (他)病了10幾年.

S.TRANSL: 病了10幾年.
He was sick for more than ten years.
五十幾年喔.
For more than fifty years..
你父親病了50多年?
Was your father sick for fifty years?
是的.
Yes.
那麼久.
Such a long time.

TRANSL.notes: (家父那時)就天天咳嗽.

S.TRANSL: 就天天咳嗽.
My father coughed everyday.

S.FORM: o wada mnarux paru ciida mnarux ini tutuy bsiyaq.
S.PHON: o wada mnaɾux paɾu ʦiida mnaɾux ini tutuj bsijaq.
S.FORM: o wada mnarux paru ciida mnarux ini tutuy bsiyaq.
S.PHON: o wada mnaɾux paɾu ʦiida mnaɾux ini tutuj bsijaq.

and he did not allow my mother to remarry.

S.TRANSL: If my mother got remarried, our children would be miserable

嗯.
I see.

S.TRANSL: 我們不會葬到別人的院子,是葬在自家的院子.
We did not bury somebody else's yard. We buried them in our own yards.

TRANSL.notes: (葬在)屬於自己的地.

S.TRANSL: 屬於自己的地.
Under the own ground.

S.FORM: nita nak dheran ini preus seediq.
S.PHON: nita nak dħeɾan ini pɾeus seediq.
S.FORM: nita nak dheran ini preus seediq.

TRANSL.notes: (葬在)屬於自己的私有地. 我們不會互相埋在對方的地.

S.TRANSL: 屬於自己的私有地. 我們不會互相埋在對方的地.
Under the own ground. We don't bury the dead in each other's land.

S.FORM: o o o ma musa so toma a mudu so gaga uri ga toma mudu so gaga bakimu.

S.TRANSL: 就像葬在橘子樹之下 ,先祖父就葬在像那樣的橘子樹之下.
It's like we buried them under the orange trees. My late grandfather were buried under oranges trees like that.

S.TRANSL: 屬於妳們的耕作地嗎?那地是我們自己的私有地嗎?
Was that field cultivated by you, or did it belong to your land?
我們自己的地.
That was our land.

S.FORM: um ga toma repun toma mudu toma sapahna a paimu a henu a takun boxin.

S.TRANSL: Takun Boxin就葬在穀倉地基底下.. 葬在我先祖母的橘子樹之下.
Takun Boxin was buried under a storehouse, under my later grandmother's orange trees.

S.TRANSL: 他 就先預購了甕,他被放進大甕中,大口的甕中 .
He bought big pot while alive. He was put inside the pot with big mouth.
令先父也被放進大甕中嗎?
Was your late father also put in the pot?

It is my grandfather who was in pot.
大約...
About...
有被放進大甕.
He was put into the pot.

TRANSL.notes: (生前)這種埋法是誰教的?

S.TRANSL: 這種埋法是誰教的?
Who taught us to bury the dead like this?

S.TRANSL: 是他 自己 ,

S.TRANSL: It was grandfather himself .

TRANSL.notes: (那大甕的口)足以讓死者放入.

S.TRANSL: 足以讓死者放入.
It is big enough to put corpse.

S.TRANSL: 有族人生前也預先準備大甕的嗎?
Did people prepare to order a pot while they are alive?

TRANSL.notes: 大口甕是他自己買的.(他們)會預先準備.

S.TRANSL: 大口甕是他自己買的. 會預先準備.
He bought the pot with a big mouth by himself. They prepared first.
是他們自己買的吧?
They may buy it by themselves.
他們會預先準備死後要用的大口甕.
They ordered the pot they will use after they were dead.

S.FORM: kiya qitaunmu patis rmeusta sapah si ma.

I have read in a book that our people had custom of burying in house.
沒有, 泰雅族眉原群才有.
no, it is Bgala.

S.TRANSL: 原來 是泰雅眉原群的人.
It was Bgala people who had that custom.

Bgala people, as well as Toda people.
Toda群的人採屋內葬,我是不曉得.
Do Toda people have custom of buring in house? I do not know that.
Toda群的人..葬在家屋內.
Toda people buried in house.

S.TRANSL: 或許我們的先祖也曾採屋內葬,只是我們沒看過 .
We possibly had a custom of buring in house, but we were not in time to witness that.

S.TRANSL: 聽說我們的先祖曾將亡者葬在 臥榻下方的地裡..,當其家人要生火時他們 會搶著生火.
I have heard that when someone makes fire, our ancestors buried under bed scramble for the fire.

S.TRANSL: 要吃飯時他們 也會搶著先吃.
When we eat, the ghosts also scramble for meal.

S.TRANSL: Pawan, I heard at that time, when we bury them, we did not bring wood ash .

S.PHON: kika posaundaħa qbuliʦ di ma ma.

TRANSL.notes: 他們(族老們)說Pradu部落被..,他們看到亡靈們肩搭著肩酒醉.在Pradu部落那兒

S.TRANSL: 他們 說Pradu部落被..,他們看到亡靈們肩搭著肩酒醉.在Pradu部落那兒
Elderly people said they could see drunken ghost with shoulder crossing shoulder in Pradu village,

S.FORM: pradu hii sa ado wada angalun sunu peni uN pradu kiya.
S.PHON: pɾadu ħii sa ado wada aŋalun sunu peni un pɾadu kija.
S.FORM: pradu hii sa ado wada angalun sunu peni uN pradu kiya.
S.PHON: pɾadu ħii sa ado wada aŋalun sunu peni un pɾadu kija.
S.TRANSL: 因Pradu部落地震時被山崩的土石所掩埋.
since the place was buried by landslide.

TRANSL.notes: 是的(就是那樣),被山崩的土石所掩埋.

S.TRANSL: 是的 ,被山崩的土石所掩埋.
I see. The place was buried by landslide.
